revision_note: PROVISIONAL FRAME-VARIATION retry (option A of maintainer issue 17, 2026-07-11) of the v3 Option-B concise store, answering the MEASURED v3 gate failure (docs/next/analysis/knull-v3-quality-gate.md): GPT-5.6 8/10 PASS, Haiku 4/10 FAIL, with Haiku's cited evidence being SET-LEVEL TEMPLATE MONOTONY (rigid parallelism; the 'a [noun] that [verb phrase]' and 'to [verb]; to [verb]' semicolon-paraphrase skeletons) rather than any per-entry defect. This revision changes ONLY the definition wording: same 108 concepts, same relaxed Option-B contract (L-3 word band dropped, L-4 relaxed to >=1 admissible claim segment, every other G-1 clause enforced via poc/knull/lint_plain_store_v4.py). Authoring aim: genuinely varied sentence framing ACROSS the set - mixed lead types (genus-first, synonym-first, fronted context or restriction, participial and appositive leads), varied definitional strategy per concept, semicolon paraphrase pairs largely eliminated - while keeping each entry correct, concise, and in scholarly general-dictionary register (word-aptness, propriety, no unnecessary information). The eight judge-named v3 nit entries (archived, cold, conversation, kind, maker of, open, reminder, useful) and Haiku's four cited monotony exemplars (bear, birth, day, father) are specifically re-authored. The blind two-family quality gate (ASM-0703) is to be RE-RUN on this store before any freeze; nothing here is frozen by this file.

authoring_disclosure.fork: F-KN-A option (ii) full re-authoring, frame-variation retry under maintainer issue 17 (2026-07-11) after the v3 ASM-0703 gate failure on set-level template monotony; Option-B relaxed contract unchanged (L-3 dropped, L-4 >=1 admissible segment) enforced via poc/knull/lint_plain_store_v4.py; blind two-family quality gate (ASM-0703) to be re-run on this store before freeze
authoring_disclosure.drafted_by: the Fable agent session of 2026-07-11 (kernel-of-truth, issue 17)
authoring_disclosure.drafting_model_family: Claude family (Fable) - a different vendor and model family from the SmolLM2 host models
authoring_disclosure.register: concise general-dictionary English at natural entry length, with deliberately varied sentence framing across the set - mixed genus-first, synonym-first, fronted-restriction, and appositive leads; semicolon paraphrase pairs avoided; genus + differentiae, the most apt word, parenthetical subject restrictions only where load-bearing; every clause definitional; no padding toward any length target
authoring_disclosure.constraints_inherited_from_build: own-label LC1 (full label AND headword), >=1 admissible claim segment (>=15 chars, no double quotes; L-4 RELAXED from >=2 by the Option-B ruling), pairwise + vs-canonical uniqueness, no-verbatim-NSM-line, register ratio >= 0.25, own-gloss Jaccard < 0.5, ASCII only; the +/-25 percent word band (L-3) is DROPPED for this store by the same ruling

definitions.alive: possessed of life, the vital functions still going on
definitions.angry: roused to strong displeasure by some wrong or provocation
definitions.archived (bookmark boolean property): (of a bookmark) set aside in storage rather than deleted, and recoverable at need
definitions.begin (happening X begins at time T): to enter on a course, state, or operation, or set one going
definitions.believe (X believes Y): to hold something to be true, often on trust rather than proof
definitions.birth (the event): the bringing forth of young from the mother's body, at which independent life commences
definitions.bookmark: a record kept of a web page's address so that the page can be found again at will
definitions.break (X breaks Y): to fracture or force apart, as by a blow, or put a device out of working order
definitions.broken: snapped, shattered, or otherwise damaged so as not to work or hold together
definitions.cause (happening X causes happening Y): to occasion or bring about, as one happening gives rise to the next
definitions.celebration: festivity in honor of a glad occasion, with rejoicing and often ceremony
definitions.change (the event): a passage from one state, form, or condition to another
definitions.condolence (the words): words of sympathy addressed to the bereaved or to one in misfortune
definitions.conversation: informal talk between two or more persons, in which remarks pass back and forth
definitions.dead: deprived of life, every vital function at a permanent end
definitions.death (the event): the close of life, when the vital functions permanently cease
definitions.end (happening X ends at time T): to come to a stop or close, or bring a thing to its conclusion
definitions.event: an occurrence or incident, above all one of some note
definitions.find (X finds Y): to come upon or discover, either by seeking or by chance
definitions.forget (X forgets Y): to let something once known slip wholly from the mind
definitions.friend (X is a friend of Y): a person attached to another by mutual affection and esteem, apart from kin or romance
definitions.gift: a present, made freely and with nothing asked in return
definitions.give (X gives Y to someone): to bestow or hand over to another as that person's own, asking no payment
definitions.grieving: mourning over a loss, in particular over a death
definitions.happy: glad and contented, or showing such pleasure in one's manner
definitions.has part (X has part Y): to include something as a constituent or member of the whole
definitions.help (X helps Y): to lend aid, furthering what another is trying to do
definitions.helpful (of a someone): obliging, and quick to give assistance when it is wanted
definitions.inside (X is inside Y): located within something else and enclosed by its bounds
definitions.kind (gufo:Kind, sortal type): the class to which a thing belongs by its very nature, so that it remains of that class for as long as it exists
definitions.learn (X learns Y): to acquire knowledge of a subject or skill in an art, whether by study, instruction, or practice
definitions.liar: one who utters falsehoods, knowing them to be false
definitions.lie (the words): an assertion known by its speaker to be false and meant to deceive
definitions.lose (X loses Y): to mislay something, or be deprived of it against one's will
definitions.lost: gone astray or missing, its whereabouts unknown
definitions.make (X makes Y): to fashion out of parts or materials, bringing a new thing into existence
definitions.maker of (X is the maker of Y): the person by whom a thing was made or created
definitions.memory (a stored something): an impression of past experience retained in the mind, or the power of retaining such impressions
definitions.near (X is near Y): separated by only a small distance or interval in space or in time
definitions.part of (X is part of Y): a portion or division belonging to a larger whole
definitions.promise (the words): an assurance, binding on the giver, to do or forbear some stated thing
definitions.remember (X remembers Y): to retain past knowledge in the mind, or call it back when wanted
definitions.reminder (the made something): a note or token that brings back to mind what would otherwise be forgotten
definitions.repair (X repairs Y): to mend, restoring what is damaged or worn to sound condition
definitions.right (of a doable something): morally proper and just, as an action one ought to perform
definitions.sad: low in spirits, weighed down by sorrow or unhappiness
definitions.take (X takes Y): to seize or lay hold of a thing and remove it into one's possession
definitions.teacher: one whose calling is to instruct others, most often in a school
definitions.thief: one who steals what belongs to others, secretly and without any claim of right
definitions.trustworthy: deserving of confidence, being honest and reliable in word and deed
definitions.useful (of a something): serviceable for some practical end or purpose
definitions.visible: open to sight, whether by the naked eye or with an instrument's aid
definitions.wrong (of a doable something): contrary to what morality requires, and hence blameworthy
definitions.animal: any living creature, other than a plant, that feeds on organic matter and moves under its own power
definitions.ball: in games and sports, the round object that players strike, kick, or throw
definitions.bear: a massive shaggy-coated mammal with a short tail and powerful limbs
definitions.bird: any feathered, winged vertebrate, warm-blooded and hatched from an egg
definitions.blue: having the hue of a clear sky at midday or of the deep sea
definitions.book: leaves of writing or print, bound together within covers as a single work
definitions.box: a stiff-sided container, commonly lidded, used for holding or carrying goods
definitions.car: a road vehicle, driven by a motor, that seats a driver and a few passengers
definitions.cat: a small furred domestic carnivore, whiskered and soft-footed, with claws it can draw in
definitions.child: a young person below the age of puberty, or the son or daughter of any parent
definitions.close: to shut, drawing a door, lid, or cover across an opening
definitions.clothes: the garments in which people dress themselves, taken together
definitions.cold: of low temperature, notably lacking in warmth or heat
definitions.color: the quality, distinct from shape or size, by which the eye tells one hue from another
definitions.cry: to weep, shedding tears under grief, pain, or other strong emotion
definitions.day: the interval of daylight between one sunrise and the following sunset, or a full round of twenty-four hours
definitions.dog: a domesticated carnivorous mammal of the wolf family, kept as a companion or worker
definitions.eat: to chew and swallow food taken in at the mouth
definitions.eye: the organ of sight, a globe lodged in its socket at the front of the head
definitions.father: the male parent of a child
definitions.fire: the flaming state of what burns, attended by heat and light
definitions.fish: a cold-blooded animal of the water, gilled for breathing and finned for swimming
definitions.flower: the blossom of a plant, bearing the organs of its reproduction
definitions.food: nourishment of any sort, whatever is eaten or drunk to sustain life and growth
definitions.grass: the low green herbage of fields and lawns, a plant of jointed stem and narrow blade
definitions.ground: the firm surface of the earth, together with the soil that forms it
definitions.hand: the part of the arm beyond the wrist, fitted with fingers and thumb for grasping
definitions.head: the body's uppermost division, housing the brain and the chief organs of sense
definitions.house: a building in which people dwell, most commonly the home of a single family
definitions.hug: an embrace, the arms being clasped about another person in affection
definitions.jump: to spring off the ground, propelled by a quick thrust of the legs
definitions.laugh: to voice mirth or amusement in short, broken sounds
definitions.light: radiant energy of the kind the eye perceives, whereby things become visible
definitions.man: a human being of the male sex, fully grown
definitions.money: currency of any form, the coin and notes that serve as a medium of exchange
definitions.mother: the woman who has borne a child, its female parent
definitions.mouth: the opening in the lower face that serves for eating and for speech
definitions.music: the art that orders vocal or instrumental sound into melody, harmony, and rhythm
definitions.night: the hours of darkness between sunset and the next sunrise
definitions.open: to unfasten a door, lid, or cover so as to allow entry or afford a view
definitions.picture: an image of some person, scene, or object, set down on a flat surface
definitions.rabbit: a small soft-furred mammal that burrows, marked by long ears and a stubby tail
definitions.red: of the color of fresh blood or of a ripe cherry
definitions.rock: the hard mineral matter of the earth, or a great detached mass of such stone
definitions.run: to move on foot at speed, both feet leaving the ground in each stride
definitions.sit: to rest upon the buttocks, the trunk held upright
definitions.sky: the overarching expanse above the earth in which the sun, the moon, and the stars appear
definitions.sleep: that recurring state of bodily rest in which the eyes shut and consciousness is suspended
definitions.smile: a look of pleasure or goodwill in which the corners of the mouth turn upward
definitions.sun: the star at the center of our planetary system, source of the earth's light and heat
definitions.tree: a woody plant of considerable height, its branches springing from one main trunk
definitions.walk: to go along on foot at an easy pace, one foot always set on the ground
definitions.water: the clear tasteless liquid of rain, rivers, and seas
definitions.woman: an adult human being of the female sex
